channel.title: Go-Unit-Testing on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Go-Unit-Testing on Arrans github.io

item.title: hedon954/go-mysql-mocker
item.description: gmm(go-mysql-mocker) is a simple but useful tool to mock mysql server in Go project, it is especially useful in unit testing. This tool uses dolthub/go-mysql-server as memory server and gorm to auto create table and init data.
